headline: Why GE Vernova, Caterpillar Stocks Are Getting Crushed
summary: A Wall Street downgrade of Siemens Energy has sparked a sell of in shares of power generation equipment providers.

headline: Shares of companies in the industrial sector are trading higher following President Trump's decision to implement a 90-day pause on reciprocal tariffs.
